'''Pitareeze Inc.''' was a company owned by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Pitareeze]] on the droid planet of [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. The company specialized in making ships.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1994) 1|''Droids'' (1994) 1]]
